# Open Storyboard Canvas Director Studio Attribution

Banana's `3D导演台` node ports Director Studio concepts, data shapes, procedural staging behavior, and prompt/snapshot workflows from:

- Open Storyboard Canvas: https://github.com/ganbo-gab/open-storyboard-canvas
- Open Storyboard Canvas additions Copyright (c) 2026 ganbo-gab and contributors
- Original project attribution: Storyboard-Copilot by henjicc / 痕继痕迹
- Original project link: https://github.com/henjicc/Storyboard-Copilot

Only the Director Studio / Blueprint staging functionality is used. React, Tauri, Zustand, provider integrations, and unrelated canvas product features are not ported.

The referenced project is MIT licensed and requires the copyright notice and original attribution above to be included in substantial portions of reused software.
